//: Optional. Include a config.json ONLY if the skill needs setup or user preferences. Delete this file if it doesn't. Keys below are illustrative — there is no fixed schema; the skill body reads whatever it needs.

setup.//: Prompts shown when the skill is first used and required config is missing. Prefer the AskUserQuestion tool for structured choices over free-text where the options are known.

prompts.question: What's the base URL of your monitoring dashboard?
Which environment should this default to?

preferences.//: Defaults the skill reads each run. Override per-invocation in the prompt.

data.//: If the skill needs memory across runs, write an append-only log or small JSON file under ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA} and read it back to answer 'what changed since last run?'. Only add this if the skill genuinely needs history.
